title: F5 XC Context
description: Schema for F5 XC context files stored in ~/.config/xcsh/contexts/<name>.json. Validated at load, create, and import time.

$schema.description: Optional schema reference for editor autocomplete and validation.

name.description: Context name. Derived from filename. Must not collide with /context subcommands.

apiUrl.description: F5 XC console API URL (must be HTTPS).

defaultNamespace.description: Default namespace for CRUD operations. Projected as XCSH_NAMESPACE in bash environment. Use /context namespace to change.

env.description: Additional environment variables injected into bash sessions. Reserved keys that have dedicated top-level fields are forbidden.

allOf.description: Keys must be valid environment variable names.
Reserved keys have dedicated top-level fields and must not appear in env.

sensitiveKeys.description: Env var names from env whose values should be masked in output. Values must reference keys present in env (enforced at runtime).

includeSkills.description: Skill names to force-include when this context is active. Must not overlap with excludeSkills (enforced at runtime).

excludeSkills.description: Skill names to exclude when this context is active. Must not overlap with includeSkills (enforced at runtime).

version.description: Schema version. Must be <= CURRENT_SCHEMA_VERSION (enforced at runtime since the ceiling is dynamic).
